author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for replacing the 84-line fn handle_key with an explicit enum InputMode { Editing, AwaitingPermission(PendingPermission), Streaming } and per-mode handler functions. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: depends on #253 (App decomposition) — the InputMode field belongs on App.UiState in that refactor, and the per-mode handlers need access to App.Services. Doing this before #253 would just move the spaghetti. Tracked as a sub-step of the TUI refactor wave.
